questions.question_text: What is the budget for the project?
What is the schedule for the project?
What are the general requirements for the project?
What are the specific scope of work and project summary requirements?
Do you have experience with design-build construction services?
Will your proposal comply with the Uniform Guidance regulations?
What is the submittal deadline for the proposals?
What are the selection criteria and weighting for this project?
Do you provide all design and construction services required for the project?
Will your design and construction comply with the City of Gastonia Standard Specifications?
Can you confirm the location of the project at 913 N. Pryor Street, Gastonia, NC 28052?
Do you have experience in designing and constructing swimming pools with features such as geysers, buckets, rainfalls, and slides?
Will the decking be based on 7,761 square feet as specified?
Will your renovations comply with current ADA standards?
What is your proposed budget for construction, labor, and design?
Can you confirm that the features included in your design will be the same or similar to those noted in Section 2.1.1?
What is your anticipated schedule for the kickoff – scoping meeting?
What is your anticipated schedule for the 30% design review?
What is your anticipated schedule for the 100% final design plans / construction documents?
What is your anticipated schedule for the 100% design review and pre-construction meeting?
What is your anticipated schedule for permitting?
What is your anticipated schedule for construction?
What is your anticipated schedule for as-built drawings?
Will all DB design development, DB construction documents, and as-constructed drawings be submitted to the City of Gastonia Representative Tripp White?
Do you have experience in designing and constructing swimming pools?
Will your design include geysers, buckets, rainfalls, and a double-loop slide?
Can you provide a detailed plan for the decking based on 7,761 sq. ft.?
Will you demo the existing pool and remove debris?
Do you have the capability to form and do final excavation?
Can you handle the hauling of spoils on-site within the grading contractor?
Will you provide a zero entry, spiral slide, water feature, and 3-4 lane lap swim with a maximum depth of 5’?
Are you responsible for surveying, corners, elevation, and laying out the pool?
Will electrical service and water supply be on site prior to the start of construction?
Will the pool be designed and constructed of reinforced concrete in accordance with plans and engineering?
Will the reinforcing of rebar, size, and spacing be in accordance with drawings?
Will the concrete pool walls be constructed as planned and in accordance with engineering?
Will you purchase and install white goods, filtration, chemical system, and feeders as noted in the drawings?
Will you provide ladders, railings, anchors, and stanchions as noted on plans?
Will you purchase and install the Bulkhead as noted on plans?
Will you purchase and install tile as shown on drawings?
Will the interior of the pool have a waterproof plaster finish that is 3/8” to ½” thick as noted on plans?
Will any additional required equipment be provided per plan and code?
Will you provide pool maintenance and safety equipment per plan?
Will all recirculation piping be a minimum schedule of 40 PVC?
Will you install anchors for ladders, stanchions, and other anchors as noted on drawings?
Will the electrical bonding of the swimming pool be provided per code?
Will you form and install decking around the pool to have a light broom finish?
Do you support the installation of waterslides and footings?
Do you support the installation of water features such as rainfall, buckets, and geysers?
Will you comply with the pool start-up specifications?
Will you install fencing and gates per code?
Will you furnish pumps, filters, automated systems, and chlorinators?
Are you responsible for the concrete pad and rough-in for plumbing and electrical?
Will you obtain and procure all building permits, surveying, and plan reviews?
Will you ensure compliance with all NC and local Public Swimming Pool codes?
Will your proposals comply with the codes in the City of Gastonia?
Will your work comply with ADA requirements where needed?
Can you guide the City through a project from beginning to end?
Will you work with City staff and the Task Force to plan and develop the project?
Can you provide suggestions to meet the City's needs?
Will the project be turnkey with all costs included?
Will you adhere strictly to the project schedule?
How will you assist in assessing the needs of the community?
What options do you propose for meeting the identified needs?
How will you assess options for the location of the new facility?
Can you develop a conceptual design and cost estimates for the proposed facility?
Will you develop schematic design drawings to a level sufficient for establishing overall project cost and budget?
How will you analyze the ongoing costs to operate and maintain the concept facility?
What other components do you suggest for the best project outcomes?
Will the renovations comply with current ADA standards?
Can you provide a list of proposed materials for the renovations?
Will you provide a rendering for the renovations?
Will progress payments during the design phase be based on the submission, review, and acceptance of design deliverables?
Will progress payments during construction be based on the percentage of work completed on items listed on the approved schedule of values?
Will actual construction completed and in place form the basis for payment?
Will all progress payments be for the services performed through the last day of the preceding month?
Will the City of Gastonia arrange a kickoff scoping meeting after the award of the contract?
Will the meeting agenda include a review and emphasis on the needs and design objectives of the project?
Will the design schedule require a minimum of two hard copies and one electronic version?
Will any portion of the work begin construction until 100% Complete DB Construction Documents are approved?
Will you provide submittals during the design phase?
Are there areas available for use by the DBC?
What are the payment terms to the DBC?
Will you attend the on-site Preconstruction meeting arranged by the City of Gastonia?
Who will be designated as your Project Superintendent?
Will you provide a fully developed Project Schedule for the construction portion?
Will the list of subcontractors for this project match the one in your proposal?
Do you have a Waste Management Plan?
Will you provide a Quality Control Plan?
What are your correspondence procedures?
What are the roles and responsibilities for this project?
How will progress payments be managed?
What is your submittal process?
Will you provide a minimum of two color hard copies and an electronic copy of the construction schedule?
Will construction begin only after 100% Complete DB Construction Documents are approved?
Will you submit 2 paper copies and one electronic copy of the Draft DB Design Development Documents for review?
Will you submit 2 paper copies and one electronic copy of the 100% Draft DB Construction Documents for review?
Will you submit 2 paper copies and one electronic copy of the 100% Completed Stamped and Signed DB Construction Document?
Do you employ construction practices that minimize dust production and combustion byproducts?
Will you minimize noise generation during construction?
Do you operate power equipment in accordance with local noise restrictions?
Will you employ processes that ensure the generation of as little waste as possible?
Will you minimize waste disposal in landfills?
Will all material unsuitable for recycling be disposed of in a legal manner?
Will the construction site be limited to the smallest feasible area?
Is staging available in or near the construction area for a construction trailer?
Will construction equipment and material storage be located in areas near the construction site?
Will all staging areas be returned to pre-construction conditions once construction is complete?
Will the location of trailers, storage, and staging areas be approved by the City’s Project Manager?
Will parking of construction vehicles be limited to existing roads and legally designated areas?
Will each bidder base their bid upon the materials and equipment as described in the bidding documents?
Will the successful Contractor be required to obtain authorization from the Owner before installing any work in variance with the requirements of the Contract Documents?
Will all work be limited to the weekday hours of 8:00 a.m.?
Will you coordinate construction efforts to minimize impact to City personnel and the visiting public?
Will you maintain one complete full-size set of contract drawings and one full-size set of vendor-supplied drawings?
Will you clearly mark changes, deletions, and additions to show actual constructed conditions?
Will you keep record drawings current?
Will you provide certification of accuracy and completeness for monthly payment requisitions?
Will you submit complete record drawings upon completion of the total project?
Will you provide as-constructed drawings in PDF and DWG formats?
Will you provide a full-size Mylar copy of the as-constructed drawings?
Will you provide full-size paper copies of the as-constructed drawings?
Will your submission include Project Record Drawings and As-Constructed Drawings as specified?
Will you provide guarantees and bonds as specified in Performance Requirements and Specifications?
Will you verify in writing that all mechanical and electrical systems are complete?
Will you verify in writing that all mechanical and electrical systems have been properly started and are operational?
Will you verify in writing that all controls are complete and operational, and sequences have been checked and are functioning properly?
Will you submit written certification that the project is substantially complete?
Will you request a final inspection in writing upon substantial completion?
Can you ensure that the OR will proceed with an inspection within 5 days of the receipt of the request?
Will you prepare a list of deficiencies to be corrected before final acceptance?
Will you issue a Letter of Substantial Completion once the work is determined to be substantially complete?
Will you notify the DBC in writing if the work is not determined to be substantially complete?
Will you resubmit certification and request a new final inspection after completing work?
Can you complete the work described on the list of deficiencies within 10 calendar days?
What will you do if you fail to complete the work within the specified time frame?
Will you accept the work after all deficiencies have been corrected?
Do you have any ideas, thoughts, or concepts that differentiate your firm from the competition?
Can you provide a list of the licensed design professionals and licensed contractors that will work on the project?
Will you include an explanation of the key staff members and their corresponding job classifications assigned to provide the services described in this RFQ?
Will you provide resumes of each staff member designated above, including name, position, education, and years and type of experience?
What strategies will you use for the solicitation of licensed contractors or subcontractors that are compliant with N.C.G.S. Article 8, Chapter 143?
Can you coordinate the design and construction of the renovations and the new facility with the existing operations?
Can you provide detailed descriptions of no more than three projects that illustrate your experience and capabilities relevant to this project?
For projects that went forward to construction, can you include the engineer’s estimate, the successful low bid for construction, and final costs?
What is your proposed approach to this assignment?
How have your proposed Project team members performed on past projects with interactive design reviews?
What is your approach to budget management and control?
Can you develop a realistic outline schedule for the design and build process?
What is your methodology and approach for the proposed project?
Can you provide a detailed project schedule and estimated delivery time?
What is your history in completing past projects within established budgets and timelines?
What are the qualifications, relevant experience, and capabilities of your team?
Can you provide references for your past projects?
Will you submit a fully completed RFQ by the deadline?
Can the City cancel this RFP for any reason without liability?
Is there a maximum page limit for the Statement of Qualifications / Proposal?
